visual_description: A close-up of a silver Motorola flip phone displays a new message with the number 445544887700. The scene cuts to a man in a light-colored suit jacket and white shirt standing in a dimly lit room with tiled walls, holding the phone and smiling. In the background, another person is seated and smoking.
audio_description: A rhythmic, percussive beat plays in the background, creating a tense atmosphere. A male voice speaks in a foreign language, sounding urgent and commanding.
